title: Gunjan Tailor
summary: Gunjan Tailor is a solution-oriented software professional with 8.5 years of experience in backend development, test automation, and CI/CD. Skilled in .NET Core C#, MS SQL, Selenium, SpecFlow, and Azure DevOps. Currently a Senior Consultant - Development at Infogain India Pvt. Ltd., working on Mitchell International's casualty insurance claims platform.
insights: 8.5 years of backend and test automation engineering experience
Expert in .NET Core C#, MS SQL, and REST API development
Led end-to-end BDD test automation using SpecFlow, Selenium, and Page Object Model
Experience on insurance claims domain (Mitchell International via Infogain)
Star Performer Award Oct 2020; multiple Spot Awards

section_index.title: Gunjan Tailor
section_index.summary: Professional profile and contact information for Gunjan Tailor.

section_index.title: Career Objective
section_index.summary: Seeks to leverage 8.5 years of backend and automation experience to deliver scalable, high-quality solutions in a dynamic environment.

section_index.title: Skills
section_index.summary: Backend development with .NET Core C# and MS SQL; test automation with Selenium and SpecFlow BDD; CI/CD with Azure DevOps; Agile SCRUM.

section_index.title: Experience
section_index.summary: Senior Consultant - Development at Infogain India Pvt. Ltd. (Jul 2016–Present), working on Mitchell International casualty insurance claims platform. Designed REST APIs, built BDD automation framework, and maintained CI/CD pipelines.

section_index.title: Strengths
section_index.summary: Strong .NET and C# expertise; proficient in SQL Server and database optimisation; skilled in debugging and troubleshooting; effective communicator with clients and cross-functional teams.

section_index.title: Achievements / Certifications
section_index.summary: Recognised with Star Performer Award (Oct 2020) and multiple Spot Awards (Aug 2020, Jun 2023) at Infogain.

section_index.title: Education
section_index.summary: B.Tech (Information Technology) from SKIT Jaipur, 2016, 74%. Higher Secondary (CBSE) 2011, 72%.

section_index.title: Hobbies
section_index.summary: Enjoys reading motivational and self-help books.
